subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet wherein are recorded the verses of separation from this lowly and destitute servant at the hour when he departed from the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح فیه یذکر آیات الفراق من  هذ  العبد البائس الفقیر حین الذی یخرج عن شطر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @thankfulness; gratitude
